channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: WNBA Vs Caitlin Clark & The Crowning Of Arch Manning
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington bring up the drama relating to Caitlin Clark being targeted in the WNBA again and how the league seemingly is more hands off on the situation. Plus, the guys discuss Archie Manning's disappointment on his grandson Arch being crowned before he even played, Chris Johnson's awful ailment, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: No CFL For Sorsby & NBA Rumors Brewing!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington go into depth on the news that the CFL will not have Brendan Sorsby in their league die to his past gambling situation plaguing him. Plus the guys discuss the latest NBA rumors brewing such as the Warriors pursuing LeBron James with some other moves, we have another edition of the FSR IR, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Travelers Championship Finish & WR Rants!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they react to the end of the Travelers Championship with Viktor Havland beating Scottie Scheffler in the Sudden Death round to win it all. Plus, the guys hear the latest rant from Brandon Aiyuk as he shades his former agent and John Lynch, we have a OJ Simpson edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Pete Prisco Joins!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington chat with Pete Prisco as they ask him about the implications relating to Brendan Sorsby waiting a year to get drafted and the NFL Top 100 list. Plus, the guys talk more about Malik Beasley's gambling charges, we hear about some of the funny antics in the World Cup from fans pranking each, and much more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: New Scenery For Ja Morant
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington discuss the Ja Morant trade to the Trailblazers the other day and wonder if this change of scenery will be enough to recapture the magic he once had. Plus, the guys wonder about the bid for the Seahawks and who are the candidates to buy the team, we have another edition of What Are We Watching, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Diana Russini's Ticket Footage
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they hear from the Diana Russini body cam footage for when she was ticketed earlier in the year. Plus, the guys go over some World Cup upsets such as Paraguay knocking out Germany, we have a Jake Paul edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: LeBron James Decision Part Three
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington go into depth on the whole LeBron James free agency debacle that has now turned into another version of "The Decision" part three. Plus, the guys talk about wedding bells relating to Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift getting married over the weekend, we have another edition of the FSR IR, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Red Card Reversal!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they discuss Folarin Balogun's red card and suspension both being reversed by FIFA. Plus, the guys try to make sense of Brandon Aiyuk's latest shot at Jayden Daniels, we have a pub related edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Celebrity Star Power, Brian Baumgartner
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are live from the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe, Nevada and they are awestruck at the celebrity star power at this tournament.  And actor Brian Baumgartner drops by to talk some golf, sports and more.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – USMNT’s Future, LeBron James Hijinx
item.description:
DP continues his conversation on the U.S. Men's Team and their performance during the World Cup and questions the legitimacy of the team.  Dan and the Danettes play the "Lebron James Game" where the gang guesses where Lebron is going to play in the NBA next season and how he will announce it.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Messi Is Inevitable, Taylor Twellman
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes arrive in Lake Tahoe for a 3-day broadcast from the American Century golf tournament and DP weighs in on the latest action from the World Cup, including the USMNT’s embarrassing loss to Belgium on Monday night and Argentina’s epic comeback vs. Egypt. And soccer analyst, Taylor Twellman joins the show to talk about the USMNT vs Belgium team at the World Cup, and what's next for the United States team after their humiliating 4-1 loss to Belgium in the round of 16.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – U.S. Needs Soccer Academies, Mike Macdonald
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are once again live from the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe, California. Dan and crew discuss 2027 NBA title odds, the human limitations of various athletic and sporting feats, the soccer infrastructure in the US vs. Europe, and much more. Seattle Seahawks coach Mike Macdonald joins the show to reflect on the Seahawks' Super Bowl win, his meetup with coach Bill Belichick, his young kids, and more.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Justin Verlander Announces Retirement, Kevin O’Connell, Kevin Frazier
item.description:
With Justin Verlander announcing his retirement, Dan and the Danettes discuss the generation of great pitchers and the awards and records that might not get touched again in this new era of pitching. Minnesota Vikings Head Coach Kevin O’Connell joins Dan to talk about trying to bring a Lombardi Trophy to Minneapolis, what defensive coordinator Brian Flores does for the Vikings roster and working with new Vikings quarterback Kyler Murray. And a surprise visit by Kevin Frazier from Entertainment Tonight as he rants about the men’s US soccer team, Alexei Lalas, and why the United States is placing profit over developing the best talent in soccer.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Kyle Hamilton, Bother-in-Law Bump
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes report in from the American Century Celebrity Golf Championship in Lake Tahoe. Ravens’ safety Kyle Hamilton joins Dan and talks about what drew him to Notre Dame, facing off against Derrick Henry, and his issue with fan voting for the Pro Bowl in the NFL. Jason Kelce gets a bump being the brother-in-law of Taylor Swift, and the Backroom Guys get excited to get a picture with Sanjay Gupta.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 - Nate Bargatze, Austin Reaves
item.description:
It's the final day at the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe, California, and Dan welcomes comedian Nate Bargatze to the show. Dan and Nate discuss a variety of topics—including Nate being a Vanderbilt football fan, his theme park aspirations, hydrating with an IV, eating fast food, the cold cruelty of stand-up comedy, and much more. And Lakers guard Austin Reaves dropped by earlier in the week and he spoke about his new contract and his future in Los Angeles.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – NBA Summer League, Steve Young
item.description:
Dan reacts to AJ Dybantsa and Darryn Peterson dueling in the NBA Summer League. Super Bowl champion Steve Young joins Dan to talk about playing in the American Century Celebrity Golf Tournament, former athletes trying to play golf, and guys he schooled on the gridiron getting payback on the golf course.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Dan Patrick Stood Up by the WNBA, Kevin Frazier vs. Alexei Lalas, Peter Jacobsen
item.description:
Dan had secured an interview with the commissioner of the WNBA, only to be stonewalled by PR and left in the dark. Why does the WNBA avoid the tough questions about Caitlin Clark? Dan and the Danettes revisit the comments by Entertainment Tonight’s Kevin Frazier about youth soccer and Alexei Lalas’s comments as the debate about youth soccer development goes on. Former pro golf and NBC Sports golf analyst Peter Jacobsen joins the show to talk to Dan about getting mad at Dan on the golf course, and shares stories of Michael Jordan golfing.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
